subject:
the outdated files will be processed again together with
 unprocessed data
body:
I once processed a batch of data which is stored in the tilt folder. 
And  then I collected new data and placed it into this tilt folder 
containing processed data. The new data will appear as unprocessed, in 
gray. Some files appeared as outdated, in yellow. When estimated these new 
unprocessed files' CTF, the outdated files will be processed again as well. 
How can I avoid the outdated files being processed again?
